title: ornithogalum biflorum
intro: Ornithogalum biflorum, also known as the twin-flowered star of Bethlehem, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Ornithogalum biflorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural antacid. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
